# 熙の日記 / Azusawa Hikari

Official site: https://hikarisdiary.github.io/

熙の日記 is the official independent Lo-fi music project and profile page for 梓沢ひかり (Azusawa Hikari). The project publishes Lo-fi, Lo-fi Beats, and Chillhop music, with the current official playlist on YouTube.

Official identity links:

- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@azusawa-hikari
- Facebook: https://facebook.com/AzusawaHikari
- Contact: hikarisdiary.lofi@gmail.com

Canonical entity description: Official independent Lo-fi music project and creator profile for Azusawa Hikari.
